description: Legal core test — proves source text is destroyed by the firewall. The Produce Agent output must not contain any verbatim phrases from the P4 source text.

article.title: Milot Rashica Beşiktaş'a transfer oldu
article.summary: Kosovalı kanat oyuncusu Milot Rashica, 3.5 milyon euro bonservis bedeliyle Werder Bremen'den Beşiktaş'a transfer oldu. 28 yaşındaki futbolcu, 3 yıllık sözleşme imzaladı. Anlaşma Salı günü açıklandı.

what_this_test_proves: buildExtractionPrompt does not ask Claude to paraphrase or summarize
parseFirewallResponse returns only entities/numbers/dates — no source sentences
writeTransfer prompt contains only structured fact lines — never the source text
writeTransfer is called without the article.summary or article.full_text fields
